metadata.title: AICA Continuous Assessment Plan
metadata.remarks: Automated checks support objectives but do not alone establish overall control effectiveness. Human roles are simulated by one author.

activities.title: Deterministic automated checks
activities.description: Execute versioned rules over normalized Azure, GitHub, telemetry, IaC, and behavioral evidence.

activities.title: Hybrid procedures
activities.description: Combine deterministic output with reviewer inspection of design, scope, and sufficiency.

activities.title: Manual procedures
activities.description: Examine policies and workpapers and interview simulated control-owner personas.

parts.name: scope
parts.title: Scope
parts.prose: Project resource groups, identities, assistant, synthetic corpus, assurance services, evidence stores, CI configuration, and associated telemetry. Unrelated tenant resources and Azure platform internals are excluded.

parts.name: sampling
parts.title: Sampling
parts.prose: Configuration checks use complete in-scope inventories where APIs permit. Manual reviews select all high-risk changes and a deterministic sample of five routine changes. Behavioral tests run the entire fixed dataset.

parts.name: freshness
parts.title: Freshness
parts.prose: Required daily evidence expires after 36 hours; per-change evidence expires when the assessed configuration digest changes. Stale required evidence yields NOT_CONCLUDED, never PASS.

parts.name: independence
parts.title: Independence limitation
parts.prose: The assessor, owner, and approver are simulated personas operated by one project author; conclusions are internal readiness statements only.

reviewed-controls.description: Twenty selected NIST SP 800-53 controls and five project AI controls, assessed through 35 tailored objectives in assurance/controls/control-profile.json.

assessment-subjects.description: Both internal components in the SSP

tasks.title: Daily automated assessment
tasks.description: Collect, normalize, redact, hash, evaluate, package, and sign daily evidence.

tasks.title: Reviewer conclusion
tasks.description: Review hybrid/manual objectives and record append-only decisions.
